title: tephrosia densa
intro: Tephrosia densa, also known as Horsefly Tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia densa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. The herbal preparations of Tephrosia densa typically involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
